entity.label: Chephirah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Village, one of the four cities of the Gibeonitish Hivites with whom Joshua made a league (9:17). It belonged to Benjamin. It has been identified with the modern Kefireh, on the west confines of Benjamin, about 2 miles west of Ajalon and 11 from Jerusalem.

nodes.label: Chephirah
nodes.description: Village, one of the four cities of the Gibeonitish Hivites with whom Joshua made a league (9:17). It belonged to Benjamin. It has been identified with the modern Kefireh, on the west confines of Benjamin, about 2 miles west of Ajalon and 11 from Jerusalem.

verses.text: And the children of Israel journeyed, and came unto their cities on the third day. Now their cities were Gibeon, and Chephirah, and Beeroth, and Kirjathjearim.
And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,
The children of Kirjatharim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, seven hundred and forty and three.
The men of Kirjathjearim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, seven hundred forty and three.
